description:
## Parent

Parent epic: Markdown typography settings.

## Dependencies

Requires the settings persistence/RPC slice and configurable Markdown renderer slice.

## Background

Users need a discoverable Settings surface where they can directly enter an exact Markdown size, see the result immediately, and trust that valid changes persist. The existing left sidebar is the stable app-level navigation surface and there is no router.

## What to Build

Add a Settings button near the bottom of the left sidebar above the Workspace selector. Opening it replaces the main content with a focused Settings page while leaving the sidebar visible. Returning to the Issue Explorer preserves the active Issue List View, Issue Search query, list position, and selected Issue.

Load app settings through the typed RPC boundary and pass the resolved size through app composition to every shared Markdown renderer. The Settings page contains a labeled number input with `px` units, 8–32 range guidance, a representative live Markdown preview, Reset to the 14px default, save status, and read/save error feedback.

Keep an editable draft separate from the last valid value. Every valid whole-number change updates the preview and Issue Markdown immediately and is automatically persisted. Empty, fractional, non-numeric, and out-of-range drafts show validation, retain the last valid preview, and do not call persistence. Do not add sliders or preset choices.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Settings is a bottom-sidebar app destination, not an Issue List View or modal.
- [ ] Opening Settings keeps the sidebar visible and replaces the main content.
- [ ] Returning preserves Issue Explorer view, search, scroll, and selection state.
- [ ] The page uses one direct numeric pixel input; no slider or presets exist.
- [ ] Valid 8–32 whole-number changes update the preview immediately.
- [ ] Valid changes automatically call the typed settings update operation.
- [ ] Invalid/partial drafts show accessible validation and do not update the preview or persist.
- [ ] Reset restores 14px and persists it.
- [ ] Descriptions and comments use the resolved app-wide size.
- [ ] Read failures fall back to 14px and are visible in Settings.
- [ ] Save failures are visible without making the page unusable.
- [ ] Keyboard and screen-reader labels cover navigation, input, units, range, validation, preview, and errors.
- [ ] React Testing Library tests cover navigation, editing, validation, live preview, persistence calls, failures, reset, and preserved Issue context.
- [ ] Relevant frontend formatting, lint, tests, React Doctor regression scan, and build pass.

## Out of Scope

- Font-family controls.
- Separate code font size.
- General routing infrastructure.
- Per-Workspace settings.
- Non-Markdown UI scaling.

## Triage

ready-for-agent
title: Add the Settings page and Markdown size input
